master_style_anchor: sleek minimalist geometric modern flat vector illustration style, sophisticated corporate tech aesthetic, elegant muted color palette, clean vector shapes without black outlines, character is set inside an evocative church or sanctuary environment with visible pews, stained glass, or warm architectural lighting in the background, 1:1 aspect ratio square composition, profile picture layout

Crucifer / Acolyte.male: A sincere male young teenager in a white alb carrying a tall processional cross down a stone center aisle
Crucifer / Acolyte.female: A sincere female young teenager in a white alb carrying a tall processional cross down a stone center aisle

Chalicist.female: A reverent female adult holding a golden chalice near a high altar with glowing candles

Lector.female: A dignified female adult reading from an ornate brass eagle lectern

Verger.female: A distinguished female adult holding a wooden verge guiding a procession near wooden pews

Altar Guild.female: A dedicated female adult arranging pristine linens near a sanctuary rail and altar

Usher.female: A confident female adult wearing a neat blazer handing out bulletins at heavy wooden sanctuary doors

Worship Band.female: A passionate female adult singing into a microphone on a darkly lit worship stage with modern spotlights

Connect Center Host.female: A welcoming female adult standing in a contemporary brightly lit church lobby holding an information ipad

Kids Church Leader.female: An enthusiastic female adult surrounded by vibrant colors pointing at a modern interactive screen in a children's ministry auditorium
